description: A pair of open-toed, purple and black sandals, has low top and slip-on stylingSynthetic, thong style upper, has a plastic toe separator, beaded detail near the toe separator with an ankle loop and a narrow strap on the heel collarSoft, lightly padded footbed with branding on the heelRubber outsole with an upraised heel, has textured detail on the forefoot region and grooves on the heel regionWarranty: 30 days from the date of purchase, against manufacturing defects only
